cleavage agent: subjected to in-gel digestion with trypsin
collision energy: Normalized collision energy of 40% was used
fractionation method: cut from the gel and subjected to in-gel digestion
fragmentation method: the most intense ions (up to 15) from the full scan MS were selected for sequencing in the LTQ
instrument: the mass spectrometer instrument (Orbitrap Velos, Thermo)
